title: Generate a PRD after completing the interview
description: An authenticated user can finish the interview flow, trigger generation, and reach the saved result document.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /interview
Complete the interview context with product answers
Trigger PRD generation
Verify the generated result page is displayed
Verify the PRD document content is displayed

title: Sign in and return to the requested page
description: This verifies that a user who starts from a protected page is returned to that page after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the user is signed in

title: Start the PRD interview from the landing page
description: A visitor can begin the PRD interview from the landing page and reach the authenticated interview flow after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary action to start the PRD interview
Navigate to /login
Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the interview start screen is displayed

title: Start PRD creation from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can begin the PRD interview from the landing page and reach the authenticated interview start after sign-in.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to start PRD creation
Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the interview start screen is displayed
Verify the user is signed in

title: Complete an interview answer and advance to the next question
description: An authenticated user can submit an answer in the AI interview and continue to the next question with progress updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /interview
Fill in the response field with a clear product answer
Send the response
Verify the next interview question is displayed
Verify the progress checklist is updated

title: Resume an unfinished interview from the dashboard
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open a saved draft interview and continue the unfinished interview session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Open a saved draft interview
Verify the interview session is displayed
Verify the unfinished draft content is restored

title: Open the dashboard from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can enter the dashboard from the landing page and reach the authenticated area after sign-in.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the dashboard
Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the user is signed in

title: Resume a saved interview draft
description: A returning user can open a saved interview session and continue from the remaining questions.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /interview
Send a partial interview answer
Open the saved session link from the interview flow
Verify the interview resumes with the saved conversation

title: View dashboard history and search saved documents
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can inspect dashboard counts, search document history, and open a saved document.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Search for an existing document title
Verify document history results are displayed
Verify dashboard summary counts are displayed

title: Open the dashboard and find a saved document
description: An authenticated user can open the dashboard and see saved document history for browsing and reopening work.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify saved documents are displayed
Verify the document history summary is displayed

title: Explore the product preview on the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can understand the product value from the landing page and inspect the available output previews and workflow steps.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the product overview is displayed
Switch to the PRD preview tab
Verify a PRD preview is displayed
Switch to the UI Prompt preview tab
Verify a UI Prompt preview is displayed
Switch to the document versions preview tab
Verify a document versions preview is displayed

title: Review the generated UI Prompt alongside the PRD
description: A user can switch from the PRD view to the UI Prompt view on a generated result and see the alternate document content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /result/[id]
Switch to the UI Prompt view
Verify the UI Prompt content is displayed
Verify the PRD content is no longer the active view

title: Start a new interview from the dashboard
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can launch a fresh PRD interview from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Start a new PRD interview
Verify the interview start screen is displayed
Verify the user can begin a new session

title: Jump to a section from the table of contents
description: A user can navigate within a generated result by selecting a table of contents entry and reaching the chosen section.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /result/[id]
Select a section from the table of contents
Verify the selected section is displayed in view

title: Use a quick suggestion to respond in the interview
description: An authenticated user can pick a quick suggestion and see it applied to the interview flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /interview
Select a quick suggestion
Verify the suggestion is applied to the response or the interview advances

title: Review the workflow steps on the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can inspect the workflow preview and read the step-by-step guidance before starting an interview.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch to the first workflow step
Verify the first workflow step details are displayed
Switch to another workflow step
Verify the selected workflow step details are displayed

title: Revise a section and view the updated version
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can add a note to one section, generate a targeted revision, and see a new version selected with the revised content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a generated result document
Choose a section to revise
Type a clear revision note for the selected section
Review the selected section
Verify a new version is selected
Verify the revised section content is displayed

title: Copy the current document content
description: A user can copy the current result content and complete the copy action successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /result/[id]
Copy the current document content
Verify the copy action completes successfully

title: Download the current document as markdown
description: A user can download the current result content as a markdown file from the result page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /result/[id]
Download the current document as markdown
Verify the download action completes successfully

title: Revise only the chosen section
description: This verifies that adding a note for one section produces a revised version while other sections remain available in the document.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a generated result document
Choose a section to revise
Type a focused revision note for the selected section
Review the selected section
Verify the revised section is updated
Verify unchanged sections are still available

title: Keep the selected version after revision
description: This verifies that after a successful revision the document stays on the newly created version so the user can continue reviewing it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a generated result document
Choose a section to revise
Type a clear revision note for the selected section
Review the selected section
Verify the latest version remains selected
Verify the revised document is displayed

title: Resume reviewing after a successful revision
description: This verifies that after revising one section, the user can keep reviewing the document and navigate to other sections without losing the updated version.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a generated result document
Choose a section to revise
Type a clear revision note for the selected section
Review the selected section
Jump to another section from the table of contents
Verify the other section is displayed
Verify the revised version remains available

title: Revise a section from the UI Prompt view
description: This verifies that section-level revision works when the user switches to the UI Prompt tab and revises content there.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a generated result document
Switch to the UI Prompt view
Choose a section to revise
Type a clear revision note for the selected section
Review the selected section
Verify a revised UI Prompt version is displayed
Verify the updated section content is visible

title: Cancel account selection and remain signed out
description: This verifies that abandoning sign-in does not authenticate the user and keeps them on the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Start Google sign-in
Cancel account selection
Verify the login page is still displayed
Verify the user is not signed in

title: See validation when revision note is empty
description: This verifies that the interface blocks revision review when the user has not provided a usable note for the selected section.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a generated result document
Choose a section to revise
Leave the revision note empty
Review the selected section
Verify a validation message is visible
Verify the revision is not created

title: See validation when revision note is unclear
description: This verifies that an unclear note is rejected or flagged so the user can revise with enough detail to proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a generated result document
Choose a section to revise
Type an unclear revision note
Review the selected section
Verify a revision guidance or validation message is visible
Verify the section is not revised
